ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_type" INTEGER /* Type of game (e.g., tournament, casual) */,
  "game_format" TEXT /* Format of the game (e.g., blitz, rapid, classical) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "player1_id" INTEGER /* ID of player 1 */,
  "player2_id" INTEGER /* ID of player 2 */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the game (e.g., win, loss, draw) */,
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tournament the game belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number in the tournament */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., ongoing, completed, abandoned) */,
  "board_number" INTEGER /* Board number in a tournament */,
  "eco_code" TEXT /* ECO code for the opening used in the game */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control format (e.g., 10+0, 25+5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_tournament_id FOREIGN KEY ("tournament_id") REFERENCES tournaments ("tournament_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player2_id FOREIGN KEY ("player2_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_game_type FOREIGN KEY ("game_type") REFERENCES game_type ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_player1_id FOREIGN KEY ("player1_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Current rating of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the player */,
  "fide_id" TEXT /* FIDE ID for professional players */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the player account was last updated */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date and time of the player's last activity on the platform */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_moves" (
  "move_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the move belongs to */,
  "move_number" INTEGER /* Move number (1-indexed) */,
  "move" TEXT /* Move made (e.g., e2-e4) */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to make the move in seconds */,
  "fen_position" TEXT /* FEN string representing the board position before the move */,
  "eval" REAL /* Evaluation of the position by the chess engine */,
  "move_order" TEXT /* Order of the move in the game (e.g., 1.e4, 1...e5, 2.Nf3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_moves_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game the statistic belongs to */,
  "depth" INTEGER /* Search depth used by the chess engine */,
  "best_move" TEXT /* Best move suggested by the chess engine */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the game */,
  "time_taken" REAL /* Time taken to complete the game in seconds */,
  "nodes" INTEGER /* Number of nodes searched by the chess engine */,
  "nps" INTEGER /* Nodes per second searched by the chess engine */,
  "ply_count" INTEGER /* Total number of moves (plies) in the game */,
  "engine_used" TEXT /* Name of the chess engine used for analysis */,
  "analysis_depth" INTEGER /* Maximum depth of analysis by the chess engine */,
  "analysis_time" REAL /* Time taken for the chess engine to complete the analysis in seconds */,
  "opening_name" TEXT /* Name of the opening used in the game */,
  "opening_variation" TEXT /* Specific variation of the opening used in the game */,
  "game_phase" TEXT /* Phase of the game (e.g., opening, middlegame, endgame) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., player, coach, analyst) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "can_edit_games" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit game details */,
  "can_edit_players" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit player details */,
  "can_export_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can export data */,
  "can_import_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can import data */,
  "can_view_private_data" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view private player data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Permission (e.g., view_games, analyze_games) */,
  "can_edit_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can edit user roles */,
  "can_assign_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can assign roles to users */,
  "can_view_logs" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role can view system logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_type" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the game type (e.g., tournament, casual) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game type */,
  "is_rating_affected" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game type affects player ratings */,
  "is_tournament" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game type is a tournament game */,
  "is_casual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the game type is a casual game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tournaments" (
  "tournament_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tournament */,
  "tournament_name" TEXT /* Name of the tournament */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the tournament */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the tournament */,
  "organizer" TEXT /* Organizer of the tournament */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the tournament */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tournament */,
  "number_of_rounds" INTEGER /* Number of rounds in the tournament */,
  "time_control" TEXT /* Time control format for the tournament */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the tournament (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tournament_id")
)
